response: Yes, both Deerhunter and Nine Lashes are American Christian rock bands. Deerhunter is an American rock band from Atlanta, Georgia, formed in 2001, consisting of Bradford Cox (vocals, guitar, keyboards), Moses Archuleta (drums, electronics, sound treatments), Lockett Pundt (guitar, vocals, keyboards), Josh McKay (bass), and Javier Morales (keyboards, synthesizers, alto saxophone) and Rhasaan Manning (percussion, electronics). Nine Lashes is an American Christian rock band from Birmingham, Alabama, formed in 2006, known for their independent debut album "Escape" and their third album "From Water to War." Both bands have contributed to the Christian rock scene in the United States.
